channel.title: Debian-Packages on Arrans github.io

item.title: oOthkOo/whatsapp-desktop
item.description: Unofficial WhatsApp Desktop Client for OSX, Linux and Windows. Build with Electron.

item.title: mmk2410/intellij-idea-community
item.description: Unofficial .deb packages of IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition. This is a mirror of
